# DEBASS meta-classifier — pinned dependencies
# Install into a virtualenv on SCC:
#   python3 -m venv ~/debass_env
#   source ~/debass_env/bin/activate
#   pip install -r env/requirements.txt

# Validation

jsonschema>=4.0

# CLI
rich>=13.0
